name: Dr. Jane Goodall
role: Primatologist & Conservation Advocate, Jane Goodall Institute
quote: Every individual matters. Every individual has a role to play. Every individual makes a difference. And we have a choice — what kind of difference do we want to make?

name: Dr. E.O. Wilson (1929–2021)
role: Biologist & Father of Biodiversity Science, Harvard University
quote: If all mankind were to disappear, the world would regenerate back to the rich state of equilibrium that existed ten thousand years ago. If insects were to vanish, the environment would collapse into chaos.

name: Sir David Attenborough
role: Naturalist, BBC Natural History Unit — Conservation Ambassador
quote: No one will protect what they don't care about; and no one will care about what they have never experienced. It is time to work with nature rather than against it.

name: US Fish & Wildlife Service
role: Federal Agency — Endangered Species Act Administration
quote: The Endangered Species Act has prevented the extinction of 99% of the species it has protected since 1973. It is one of the world's most powerful and effective conservation laws.

name: China National Forestry & Grassland Administration
role: Government Agency — Giant Panda Conservation Authority
quote: The giant panda's recovery from endangered to vulnerable demonstrates that with political commitment, scientific investment, and dedicated habitat protection, even the most imperiled species can be brought back.

name: Rewilding Europe
role: NGO — Large-scale Ecosystem Restoration, 10 Rewilding Areas Across Europe
quote: We need to give more space to nature. Rewilding is not just about wolves or bears — it is about restoring entire ecosystem processes, letting nature heal itself, and creating new economic opportunities for rural communities.

name: IUCN Species Survival Commission
role: Global Authority — Red List Assessments; 10,000+ Volunteer Scientists
quote: The IUCN Red List is the world's most comprehensive information source on the global extinction risk status of animal, fungus and plant species. Nearly 44,000 of the 157,000 assessed species are threatened with extinction.

name: The Peregrine Fund
role: Conservation Organization — Raptor Recovery Programs Worldwide
quote: In 1970, there were no peregrine falcons east of the Mississippi. Today they nest on skyscrapers in every major US city. This is what science-based conservation achieves when we commit to it.

name: Safari Club International Foundation
role: Industry Organization — Regulated Trophy Hunting Advocate
quote: Regulated, science-based hunting is one of the most effective tools for funding wildlife conservation and creating economic incentives for communities to protect wildlife. Without hunting revenue, vast areas of Africa would be converted to farmland.

name: CropLife America / ECPA
quote: Modern crop protection products undergo the most rigorous safety review process of any commercial chemical. Our members support pollinators and biodiversity — responsible pesticide use is compatible with healthy ecosystems when label directions are followed.

name: COICA (Coordinator of Indigenous Organizations of the Amazon River Basin)
role: Community Representative — Indigenous Territorial Rights & Stewardship
quote: We have protected these forests for millennia without the need of a protected area decree. Our territories contain 80% of the Amazon's biodiversity. Conservation must begin by recognizing and strengthening our territorial rights, not by displacing us.

name: New Zealand Department of Conservation
role: Government Agency — Kakapo, Kiwi, and NZ Endemic Species Recovery
quote: New Zealand has already lost 50% of its bird species to introduced predators and habitat loss. The Kakapo Recovery Programme demonstrates that intensive, science-led management of individual birds can pull a species back from the very edge of extinction.
